reasons: Natalia can punish Novaria's backline positioning from bushes and fog.
Silence and burst make it harder for Novaria to safely line up long-range shots.

proof.summary: Novaria wants safe long-range casting angles, while Natalia can approach from camouflage and punish her when she is separated from protection.
worksBestWhen: Natalia controls flank bushes and tracks Novaria's rotations.
Novaria uses her long-range poke aggressively without nearby peel.
failureCases: Natalia fails to burst before Novaria escapes through terrain or receives peel.

reasons: Hayabusa can reach Novaria despite her long casting range.
His mobility punishes Novaria when she is aiming from isolated terrain angles.

proof.summary: Novaria wants to cast safely from far away, while Hayabusa can dive through shadows and force her into a close-range survival check.
worksBestWhen: Hayabusa enters after Novaria's key poke skill is used.
Hayabusa has vision of Novaria's terrain path.
failureCases: Novaria stays grouped with anti-dive protection.
Hayabusa's burst spreads onto other targets.

reasons: Harley can punish Novaria's long-range casting posture by blinking from fog, applying Deadly Magic, bursting, then returning with Space Escape.
Compared with Lancelot, Harley gives a cleaner proof because he does not need dash-reset paths through minions or multiple targets to reach Novaria.

proof.summary: Novaria wants to stay far away and aim long-range shots, while Harley can use Space Escape to close the gap, burst her with Deadly Magic and follow-up damage, then return before she can fully reposition.
worksBestWhen: Harley attacks from bush or fog before Novaria has safe terrain spacing.
Novaria has already used her movement or is aiming aggressively.
Harley avoids entering through obvious vision paths.
failureCases: Novaria stays protected behind tanks and vision.
Harley's Deadly Magic is blocked by another hero.
Novaria survives the burst and escapes through terrain with team peel.

reasons: Lolita can reduce Novaria's poke value by shielding key projectile paths.
This matters most when Novaria's team relies on long-range poke before objective fights.

proof.summary: Novaria wants to hit long-range projectile-style poke, while Lolita can block ranged attacks and projectiles to protect allies.
worksBestWhen: Lolita faces the direction of Novaria's poke.
Teammates group behind Lolita during objective setup.
failureCases: Novaria attacks from fog or a side angle.
Lolita's shield is baited before the real poke.

reasons: Saber can punish Novaria's low durability if he reaches her from fog.
Novaria is vulnerable when her terrain movement is unavailable or she is aiming instead of repositioning.

proof.summary: Novaria wants time to aim long-range shots, while Saber can force a sudden airborne burst before she escapes or receives peel.
worksBestWhen: Saber hides until Novaria steps away from protection.
Saber has enough burst to finish her during Triple Sweep.
failureCases: Novaria stays behind tanks and vision.
Saber enters through predictable paths and gets controlled.
